title.heading: Hesed's Inversion Quest
title.subtitle:
You asked: "Do you think I'll be a good dad someday?"
I made you a quest to answer it.

quests.name: The Practice Yard
quests.intro: A Glitch of Neglect has made this villager fade away. He just needs someone to show up.
npcDialogue: I've been fading... nobody comes anymore.
They all say they will. But they don't.
Can you just... stay here with me? That's it.
quests.completionMessage: You showed up. You stayed. The Glitch of Neglect is broken.
quests.shardLesson: BE THERE: Sometimes the biggest gift you can give someone is just being in the room. Not fixing anything. Not saying the right thing. Just being there. Don't be the guy people can't count on. If you say you'll show up, show up. Every single time.

quests.name: The Safe Cave
quests.intro: Wild Fire grows when you rush in. This creature needs someone who thinks before they move.
npcDialogue: The fire... it grows when people rush in without thinking.
Everyone who tried to help just made it worse.
Can you slow down? Think? Find a safe path through?
quests.completionMessage: You didn't panic. You found a way through. The Volatile Fire is out.
quests.shardLesson: FIND A WAY: The best skill you will ever learn is this: believe you can do it, then figure out how. Don't wait for someone to hand you the answer. Use your brain. Use your friends. Use what you have. When a door is locked, look for a window. There is always a way if you don't give up.

quests.name: Banner Hill
quests.intro: A Wall of Isolation blocks the path. You can't break it alone. Find your brother.
npcDialogue: I've been stuck here a long time.
I thought I could do it all by myself. I was wrong.
Will you help me? Together we can break through.
quests.completionMessage: You carried the heavy end. The Wall of Isolation crumbles.
quests.shardLesson: RUN WITH A PACK: A lone wolf might look cool. But he doesn't last. Life is too hard to do alone. You need people. And people need you. Be the teammate who shows up early and stays late. When you see someone who is struggling, help them carry it. A pack is always stronger than one.

quests.name: The Glitch Portal
quests.intro: A Cloud of Deception fills the air. Only truth can burn it away.
npcDialogue: This fog? It's made of lies. Small ones at first.
Each little lie makes it thicker. Harder to see through.
One lie can destroy years of trust in a second. Are you brave enough to be honest?

mechanicConfig.question: The Guardian speaks: "You broke something that belonged to someone you love. Nobody saw it. What do you do?"

choices.text: Hide it and hope nobody finds out.
choices.response: The fog grows thicker. Small lies always grow into big ones.

choices.text: Tell them what happened, even though it's scary.
choices.response: The fog burns away! The truth keeps you close to the people you love.
The fog grows thicker. Blaming others is just fear with a mask on.

quests.completionMessage: You told the truth when it was hard. The Cloud of Deception is gone.
quests.shardLesson: KILL THE LIE: Lies are poison. One small lie can destroy years of trust in a single second. It doesn't matter how small the lie seems. It doesn't matter if nobody saw. You will know. And it will eat at you. When you mess up, say so. Fast. Truth is the only way to keep the people you love close.

quests.name: The Listening Garden
quests.intro: The Silent Monk holds the final shard. He only gives it to those who can prove they listened.
npcDialogue: The Fire Ninja was not born powerful. He trained every single day.
His real weapon was not fire. It was that he never stopped learning.
But here is the secret: learning only counts if you can show it. Words are easy. Skills are proof.

mechanicConfig.question: What did the Monk say is the proof that you actually learned something?
mechanicConfig.retryMessage: You heard the words but missed the point. Listen again...

quests.completionMessage: You listened. You proved it. The Monk smiles.
quests.shardLesson: PROVE YOU LEARNED: Anyone can say they know stuff. That's easy. The real test is: can you DO it? Learning only matters when you build a skill from it. Don't just read about it. Don't just watch a video. Try it. Fail at it. Get better at it. That's how you prove you actually learned.

badge.title: Good Dad Badge
badge.message:
Son, you asked if you'll be a good dad.
Here's the cheat code: Flip it.
Ask "What would make me a terrible man?"
Then don't be that guy.

1. BE THERE.
   Don't be the guy who doesn't show up.
   Sometimes just being in the room is enough.

2. FIND A WAY.
   Don't wait for someone to save you.
   Believe you can, then figure out how.

3. RUN WITH A PACK.
   Don't try to do it all alone.
   A lone wolf doesn't last. Your people need you.

4. KILL THE LIE.
   Don't hide behind lies. Ever.
   One lie can destroy years of trust in a second.

5. PROVE YOU LEARNED.
   Don't just say you know stuff.
   Show it with your skills. That's the real test.

Dodge those five traps and you won't just be a good dad. You'll be the kind of man people follow into the fire.

I already see that spark in you, Hesed.
Be better than me.
I love you, son.
